description: Add a ground station named 'Tokyo' to GPredict for Tokyo, Japan (35.6762°N, 139.6503°E) with an altitude of 40 meters.

natural_language.prompt: I need to add a new ground station location in GPredict for satellite tracking from Tokyo, Japan. Please add a ground station with the following details: Name: 'Tokyo', Latitude: 35.6762 (North), Longitude: 139.6503 (East), Altitude: 40 meters. Make sure it's saved so it persists in GPredict.
